records.ety: [F. bullition, L. ebullitio, fr. ebullire. See Ebullient.]

defs: A boiling or bubbling up of a liquid; the motion produced in a liquid by its rapid conversion into vapor.
Effervescence occasioned by fermentation or by any other process which causes the liberation of a gas or an aëriform fluid, as in the mixture of an acid with a carbonated alkali.
A sudden burst or violent display; an outburst; as, an ebullition of anger or ill temper.
